name: Jane Dee
title: Head of Protocol Research
headline: Web3 protocol design and tokenomics.
shortBio: Protocol researcher and former quant. Focus on MEV, consensus, and incentive design.
longBio: Jane has spent eight years in crypto and traditional finance, with a focus on protocol-level research and tokenomics. She led research at a tier-1 L1 and has published on MEV, consensus, and incentive design. She advises teams on economic security and governance and is available for fractional or project-based engagements.

history.description: Led protocol economics and tokenomics research. Published on MEV and consensus.
Macro and crypto research.

name: Alex Rivera
title: Fintech & RegTech Lead
headline: Payments, compliance, and embedded finance.
shortBio: Ex-big bank and neobank. Builds compliant payment and lending stacks.
longBio: Alex has led product and engineering at a major bank and later at a neobank. He specializes in payments infrastructure, KYC/AML workflows, and embedded finance. He helps startups and scale-ups design compliant systems and integrate with schemes and regulators. Available for advisory and hands-on architecture.

history.description: Payments and lending product. Led compliance integration.
Core payments and KYC/AML platforms.

name: Sam Chen
title: Senior Project Manager
headline: Delivery-focused PM for software and product teams.
shortBio: PMP and Scrum Master. Ships products on time with distributed teams.
longBio: Sam has led delivery for product and engineering teams across fintech and SaaS. He runs ceremonies, keeps backlogs healthy, and unblocks stakeholders. Experienced with Agile, Kanban, and hybrid models. Available for interim PM roles and delivery coaching.

history.description: Led two product squads; improved release predictability.
Client-facing delivery for banking and insurance.

name: Morgan Webb
title: Full-Stack Web Developer
headline: React, Node, and cloud-native web apps.
shortBio: Full-stack engineer. Builds scalable web products from UI to API and deployment.
longBio: Morgan has shipped production web apps for startups and enterprises. Strong in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS or Vercel. Comfortable leading technical decisions and mentoring. Available for greenfield builds and legacy modernisation.

history.description: Owned frontend and API for core product.
Client projects in React and Node.

name: Dakota Kim
title: Backend Engineer
headline: APIs, data pipelines, and system design.
shortBio: Backend specialist. Designs and builds services that scale.
longBio: Dakota focuses on backend systems: APIs, databases, message queues, and event-driven architecture. Experience in Go, Python, and Java; comfortable with Kubernetes and cloud. Helps teams harden reliability and performance.

history.description: Led API and pipeline design; reduced latency and cost.
Order and inventory services.

name: Jordan Lee
title: Frontend Developer
headline: Accessible, performant UIs with React and design systems.
shortBio: Frontend engineer. Builds fast, accessible interfaces and reusable components.
longBio: Jordan specialises in frontend: React, Vue, design systems, and accessibility (a11y). Has led UI efforts for B2B and consumer products. Passionate about performance and inclusive design. Available for frontend builds and audits.

history.description: Design system and core product UI.
React apps and component libraries.

name: Casey Nord
title: IoT & Embedded Systems Lead
headline: Connected devices, firmware, and edge computing.
shortBio: IoT and embedded engineer. From sensors and firmware to cloud ingestion.
longBio: Casey has built IoT products in industrial and consumer settings. Experience with MCUs, RTOS, LoRa, cellular, and cloud backends (AWS IoT, etc.). Helps teams scope hardware–software integration and scale device fleets.

history.description: Fleet of sensors and edge gateways; cloud pipeline.
Firmware and connectivity for wearables.

name: Riley Park
title: Product Designer
headline: Visual design and design systems for digital products.
shortBio: Product and brand designer. Interfaces, design systems, and visual identity.
longBio: Riley designs digital products and design systems for startups and scale-ups. Strong in Figma, component libraries, and brand alignment. Has shipped design systems used across multiple products. Available for design leadership and hands-on work.

history.description: Design system and core product UI.
Client work across fintech and health.

name: Skyler Vo
title: UX Designer & Researcher
headline: User research, flows, and evidence-based UX.
shortBio: UX designer and researcher. User-centred flows and usability testing.
longBio: Skyler focuses on UX research and design: discovery, user flows, wireframes, and usability testing. Has worked in B2B and consumer products. Helps teams align on user needs and validate before build. Available for research-led projects and UX audits.

history.description: Research and UX for core product; design ops.
User research and testing for clients.

name: Reese Hall
title: QA Engineer & Tester
headline: Manual and automated testing; quality assurance.
shortBio: QA engineer. Test strategy, automation, and release confidence.
longBio: Reese has set up and run QA for web and mobile products. Experience with manual test plans, Cypress/Playwright, and CI integration. Helps teams ship with fewer regressions and clearer acceptance criteria. Available for test strategy and hands-on QA.

history.description: Test strategy and automation; release sign-off.
Manual and automated testing for web app.

name: Quinn Bennett
title: Mobile App Developer
headline: iOS and Android apps; React Native and native.
shortBio: Mobile developer. Ships iOS and Android apps with React Native or native stacks.
longBio: Quinn builds mobile apps for startups and product companies. Comfortable with React Native for cross-platform and Swift/Kotlin for native. Has shipped apps in fintech and health. Available for greenfield apps and modernisation.

history.description: React Native app; iOS and Android releases.
Native iOS app for patient engagement.
